column2: Item
No service-role/admin DB client importable from 'use client' files
column4: تم فصل client.ts عن server-only.ts، تحديث 7 ملفات. admin.ts لسا معلّق — يحتاج API routes بالخطوة القادمة

column2: middleware.ts protects all /admin routes server-side
Every API route re-checks permission server-side (not just middleware)
Server-side validation (Zod) on every input
Passwords hashed (bcrypt/argon2)
Rate limiting on login/register endpoints
No sensitive tokens stored in localStorage
Generic error messages (no info leakage on login failure)
CSRF protection / SameSite cookies on forms
Images use next/image everywhere
Fonts loaded via next/font
Heavy components lazy-loaded with next/dynamic
No full-library imports (tree-shaken imports only)
Pagination on all lists >50 items
Search inputs debounced (300ms)
React Query staleTime/gcTime configured per data type
Server fetch cache (revalidate) set for static-ish data
All interactive elements keyboard-navigable
aria-label on icon-only buttons
Color contrast >= 4.5:1 for body text
Skeleton loaders have aria-hidden + sr-only status
Form labels linked via htmlFor
Error messages linked via aria-describedby
No information conveyed by color alone
metadata API set on all public pages
sitemap.ts and robots.ts present
Single h1 per page with proper heading hierarchy
Open Graph tags on public/shareable pages
Fetcher/service layer prevents duplicate calls for same data
Clear separation: server fetch cache vs React Query cache vs CDN cache
Global onError handler configured in QueryCache/MutationCache
meta.silent escape hatch implemented for custom error messages
onSuccess toasts stay local per mutation (not global)
permissions.ts single source of truth for role checks
can() helper used instead of scattered role checks
Server-side permission check mirrors client-side check
No duplicate type definitions across files
Form types derived from Zod schemas (not hand-duplicated)
No direct DB client calls inside components
One service file per resource (tasks
Hooks wrap services; components only call hooks
Server Components used by default; 'use client' only where needed
Smallest possible subtree marked 'use client'
Error boundary (app/error.tsx) implemented
Logging/monitoring plan documented (Sentry or similar)
Audit trail for sensitive admin actions
Database backup enabled before real production data
Privacy policy / terms page present
